pageContext.name: Darth Vader
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Lladro are proud to present the Darth Vader Porcelain Statue!  The supreme master of the dark side of the force, Darth Vader, is depicted in a magnetic black porcelain creation modeled by Lladró artists. Lladró is unveiling its latest homage to the movie saga coinciding with the 45th anniversary of the first Star Wars film and 20 years after the premiere of 'Attack of the Clones' in a Limited Edition of 504 units in honor of May 4th – Star Wars Day.  Thanks to painstaking etching and a design based on strength and movement, Darth Vader's signature billowing cloak, belt, lightsaber and legendary breathing helmet will surely delight all Star Wars lovers. This fearsome Sith Lord is portrayed in his mythical black armor, instantly recognizable the world over, and a reminder of the unrivaled power that has made him one of the franchise's most iconic characters.  Darth Vader is glazed and made in black matte porcelain with some iridescent effects touches. Non-porcelain elements are his crystal saber painted in translucent red. The piece is attached to a wooden base which includes a metal plate with the Limited Edition item number.  Don't miss your chance to add the Sith Lord to your Star Wars collection today!
